# Teach Me Skills

> Curated, in-depth frontend lessons for developers and designers. Free, no sign-up required.

## Site Info

- URL: https://teachmeskills.dev
- Author: Chris
- Format: Static HTML, no frameworks

## Courses

- [CSS Mastery](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/): A 24-lesson advanced course covering modern CSS from custom properties to scroll-driven animations.
- [SVG - From Coordinates to Animation](https://teachmeskills.dev/svg/): A 13-lesson course covering SVG from first principles through to complex animation.

## SVG Lessons

- [The Coordinate System](https://teachmeskills.dev/svg/01-coordinate-system.html): viewport, viewBox, preserveAspectRatio, user vs viewport units
- [Transforms and Grouping](https://teachmeskills.dev/svg/02-transforms-and-grouping.html): translate, rotate, scale, skew, the g element, nested coordinate systems
- [Basic Shapes and Paths](https://teachmeskills.dev/svg/03-basic-shapes-and-paths.html): rect, circle, ellipse, line, polyline, polygon, path d attribute, Bezier curves
- [Styling: Presentation Attributes vs CSS](https://teachmeskills.dev/svg/04-styling-presentation-attributes-vs-css.html): cascade specificity, inline styles, external CSS, inheritance in SVG
- [Gradients, Patterns, and Paint Servers](https://teachmeskills.dev/svg/05-gradients-patterns-paint-servers.html): linearGradient, radialGradient, pattern, objectBoundingBox vs userSpaceOnUse
- [Clipping and Masking](https://teachmeskills.dev/svg/06-clipping-and-masking.html): clipPath, mask, luminance vs alpha masking
- [Filters](https://teachmeskills.dev/svg/07-filters.html): filter primitives pipeline, feGaussianBlur, feColorMatrix, feComposite, filter regions
- [Text and TextPath](https://teachmeskills.dev/svg/08-text-and-textpath.html): text positioning model, tspan, textPath, baseline alignment, text on curves
- [SMIL Animation Fundamentals](https://teachmeskills.dev/svg/09-smil-animation-fundamentals.html): animate, animateTransform, set, timing model, from/to/values, calcMode
- [SMIL Advanced](https://teachmeskills.dev/svg/10-smil-advanced.html): animateMotion, motion paths, syncbase timing, event-based triggers, additive animation
- [CSS Animation of SVG](https://teachmeskills.dev/svg/11-css-animation-of-svg.html): animatable properties, keyframes on SVG elements, transform-origin differences
- [JavaScript and SVG](https://teachmeskills.dev/svg/12-javascript-and-svg.html): DOM manipulation, createElementNS, event handling, programmatic animation
- [Putting It Together](https://teachmeskills.dev/svg/13-putting-it-together.html): capstone combining coordinate systems, animation, interactivity

## SVG Reference

- [SVG Elements and Attributes](https://teachmeskills.dev/svg/svg-elements-and-attributes.html): comprehensive reference of all SVG elements and their attributes
- [SVG DOM Methods](https://teachmeskills.dev/svg/svg-dom-methods.html): JavaScript API reference for SVG manipulation

## CSS Mastery Lessons

- [Custom Properties from the Ground Up](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/01-custom-properties-fundamentals.html): declaration, scoping, fallbacks, var(), runtime vs compile-time
- [@property - Registered Custom Properties](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/02-registered-custom-properties.html): type syntax, inherits, initial-value, animating custom properties
- [CSS Value Functions](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/03-css-value-functions.html): calc(), min(), max(), clamp(), color-mix(), composing responsive values
- [@function - Custom CSS Functions](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/04-custom-css-functions.html): parametrised reusable logic, typed parameters, defaults, if()
- [Advanced attr()](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/05-advanced-attr.html): typed attr(), HTML attributes as CSS values, data-driven styling
- [CSS Transitions](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/06-transitions.html): four parts, timing functions, cubic-bezier, performance tiers, allow-discrete
- [CSS Animations](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/07-animations.html): @keyframes, fill modes, direction, scroll-driven animations intro
- [Flexbox - How the Algorithm Works](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/08-flexbox.html): flex-basis/grow/shrink, axis model, alignment, practical patterns
- [CSS Grid - Two-Dimensional Layout](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/09-grid.html): fr, repeat, areas, subgrid, auto-flow, named lines
- [Container Queries](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/10-container-queries.html): container-type, @container, container query units, style queries
- [Cascade Layers (@layer)](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/11-cascade-layers.html): layer order, specificity bypass, !important inversion, third-party isolation
- [CSS Nesting](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/12-css-nesting.html): native nesting, & selector, nested at-rules, specificity, Sass differences
- [Modern Selectors](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/13-modern-selectors.html): :has(), :is(), :where(), :not(), specificity rules, combining
- [The Cascade - Complete Resolution Algorithm](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/14-the-cascade.html): origin, importance, layers, specificity, scope, inheritance
- [Logical Properties](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/15-logical-properties.html): block/inline axes, writing-mode awareness, inset, inline-size
- [View Transitions](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/16-view-transitions.html): startViewTransition, pseudo-element tree, shared elements, cross-document
- [Anchor Positioning](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/17-anchor-positioning.html): anchor-name, position-anchor, anchor(), position-try, popover API
- [Advanced Colour](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/18-advanced-colour.html): OKLCH, wide gamut, relative colour syntax, light-dark(), palette derivation
- [@scope - Proximity-Based Styling](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/19-scope.html): scope boundaries, limits, proximity in the cascade
- [Selectors Deep-Dive](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/20-selectors-deep-dive.html): structural pseudo-classes, form states, :nth-child gotcha, attribute selectors
- [Theming Deep-Dive](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/21-theming-deep-dive.html): three-tier tokens, multi-brand, light/dark, scoped regions, Angular patterns
- [Responsive Design Patterns](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/22-responsive-design-patterns.html): intrinsic layout, auto-fill grids, container queries, clamp(), flex-wrap
- [Scroll-Driven Animations](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/23-scroll-driven-animations.html): scroll(), view(), animation-range, named timelines, replacing JS libraries
- [Capstone: Product Landing Page](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/24-capstone-product-landing-page.html): full project using 14+ course features

## CSS Reference

- [CSS Anatomy - Symbols, Structure & Terminology](https://teachmeskills.dev/css/css-anatomy.html): rules, selectors, @-rules, --, ::, combinators, pseudo-classes
